skills: Choose 2: Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Bonus action: regain HP equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. Once per short or long rest.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Take one additional action on your turn. Once per short rest. Twice at level 17.

features.name: Superiority Dice
features.description: Spend superiority dice to fuel maneuvers. Die size increases to d10 at level 10 and d12 at level 18.

features.name: Precision Attack
features.description: Spend 1 superiority die before attack. Add the result to the attack roll.

features.name: Menacing Attack
features.description: On a hit, spend 1 superiority die. Add to damage. Target must make WIS save or be Frightened.

features.name: Pushing Attack
features.description: On a hit, spend 1 superiority die. Add to damage. Target must make STR save or be pushed 15 ft.

features.name: Know Your Enemy
features.description: Spend 1 minute observing a creature. DM compares two stats to yours.

features.name: Two Weapon Fighting
features.description: Add your ability modifier to the damage of off-hand attacks.
